title: Our Different Money Histories Are Workable
subtitle: An affirmation for approaching money disagreements in a partnership without the verdict that they are irresolvable
excerpt: A short affirmation for the money tension that comes from two people with different financial histories sharing a life. For use before a money conversation with a partner, or when the recurring argument arrives again.

practice.whenToUse: Use before a money conversation with a partner, or when the familiar disagreement starts and a different entry point is wanted.

content.text: A daily affirmation for the money tension in a partnership. Two different money histories sharing one life is not automatically a problem to solve — it is a fact to work with. The affirmation names that work as possible.
Our different money histories are workable. We find the common ground.

Say it three times before a money conversation with your partner. Say it again when the familiar argument starts and you want to approach it from a different place — when the tension is real but the verdict that nothing can change is not yet earned.
